name: twist-lon-mood-shift
description: TWiST pack — awkward pause / mood-shift / 'but/however/oops' language on a startup that crashed. Lon (soundfx slot) should appear in the chain most of the time — his patterns are broad and his job is reacting to moments.

input.transcript: Wait, hold on — actually, that company crashed and burned hard. They shut down operations last month. Wow, that's insane. But however unfortunately, um, the whole engineering team got laid off. Whoops. The Series C was supposed to be a new paradigm but it failed, and the founders admit they were wrong about the market fit. Oops.
